(
    id UInt64,
    name String,
    ts DateTime
)
ENGINE = MergeTree()
ORDER BY id ;

sqls: CREATE TABLE a(b, c);
SELECT c FROM a GROUP BY c HAVING(SELECT(sum(b) OVER(ORDER BY b), sum(b) OVER(PARTITION BY min(DISTINCT c), c ORDER BY b)));
